lesson.menu_desc: First Impressions at the Coffee Summit -- 40 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic + Self-Introduction at Sucafina
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Walyson Ginaldo Silva | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic

listenings.text: Hi, this is David Chen from the Singapore office. I am calling about the green coffee shipment for Q3. We have a situation with the export clearance. The origin warehouse informed us that the quality certification has been delayed by ten days. I know this affects our delivery timeline for the European buyers. Could we schedule a call tomorrow to discuss options? I have already contacted our backup supplier in Colombia, and they might be able to cover part of the volume. Let me know what works for you. Thanks.

Good morning everyone. This is Sarah Martinez from the trading desk with a quick update on origin operations. We have completed the first round of quality assessments for the new crop season. Three origins met our premium grade requirements, and two exceeded our cupping score benchmarks. However, we identified a logistics bottleneck at the Santos port that we need to address before the next shipment window. The lead time for container booking has increased by approximately twelve percent compared to last season. I recommend we schedule a meeting with logistics and sales to align on the revised export calendar. Please review the report and let me know your availability for Thursday or Friday.

extra_audio.text: Walyson introduces himself at the summit. He explains his role at Sucafina. Sarah asks about the Santos port operations. They discuss the new crop season. They exchange business cards and agree to follow up.
